chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-435 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of M.A. No.2159 /2018 3. For hearing of main case 06.09.2023 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- This petition in terms of the prayer was not maintainable as respondents No.5 and 6 were transferred as Clerks and they could not have assumed the charge of Tapedar. This petition as prayed was misconceived. Learned AAG, however, without prejudice the above submits that these respondents No.5 and 6 have now been transferred so this petition has virtually become infructuous. Dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
